use_cases: Ride-hailing apps for booking transportation between locations
Airport transfer booking with pickup/dropoff form
Logistics platforms for scheduling cargo pickup
On-demand service booking with location inputs
ai_summary: A ride booking form component featuring a two-column layout with an image on one side and a functional booking form on the other. Uses Framer Motion for staggered entry animations and includes inputs for pickup location, dropoff destination, date, and time selection. Designed with Lucide React icons and responsive grid layout that adapts from mobile to desktop viewports. Ideal for transportation, mobility, and logistics applications requiring user-friendly booking interfaces.
